title: Maxium
description: A performance modpack that actually does it right.
body:
A performance modpack that actually does it right.

This is a performance mod that doesn't care about bloating your mods with random themes, or mods. This modpack is made JUST for performance. This modpack contains lots of the the most top-of-the line mods there is, while strictly not letting any non-performance mods get in. We don't want to install mods you don't enjoy. This makes the game feel almost exactly vanilla while not costing anything.

![Default Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ad9406c84cebf639ba84dd00b3ec43cfab6532.png)![Maxium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7462a5a853e7f20e85b811b80e2c2998734baf.png)

Mods we include: (ALPHABETICAL ORDER)
- Bobby
- Cloth Config API
- Clumps
- Debugify
- Dynamic FPS
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Kyrpton
- Language Reload
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- ModernFix
- More Culling
- Resse's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features

As you can see, we include many performance mods, GURANTEED for higher performance, without any extra mods that don't impact performance.
